script.value:
printf "%s\n" sample2_R1.fastq.gz sample2_R2.fastq.gz | while read f;
    do
        seqtk \
            trimfq \
             \
            $f \
            | gzip --no-name > SAMPLE2_PE_$(basename $f)
    done

additionalProperty.readable:
printf "%s\n" sample2_R1.fastq.gz sample2_R2.fastq.gz | while read f;
    do
        seqtk \
            trimfq \
             \
            $f \
            | gzip --no-name > SAMPLE2_PE_$(basename $f)
    done

additionalProperty.readable:
printf "%s\n" sample1_R1.fastq.gz sample2_R1.fastq.gz | while read f;

script.value:
printf "%s %s\n" sample1_R1.fastq.gz SAMPLE1_PE_1.gz sample1_R2.fastq.gz SAMPLE1_PE_2.gz | while read old_name new_name; do
        [ -f "${new_name}" ] || ln -s $old_name $new_name
    done

    fastqc \
        --quiet \
        --threads 2 \
        --memory 2048 \
        SAMPLE1_PE_1.gz SAMPLE1_PE_2.gz
